tasks.label: 🛠 启动开发
tasks.detail: 启动 Tauri 开发模式 (Ctrl+Shift+B)

tasks.label: 📦 打包发布 ZIP
tasks.detail: 编译 + 打包 runtime 目录为 DragonTranslator.zip

tasks.label: ⬆️ 推送至 GitHub
tasks.detail: 推送本地 commit 到 GitHub

tasks.label: 🏷️ 发布 Release
tasks.command: $bump='${input:bumpLevel}'; $cargo='src-tauri\Cargo.toml'; $tauri='src-tauri\tauri.conf.json'; $cur=(Select-String -Path $cargo -Pattern '^version\s*=\s*"(.*)"').Matches.Groups[1].Value; Write-Output ">>> 当前版本: $cur"; $v=$cur -split '\.'; if($bump -eq 'major'){ $v[0]=[int]$v[0]+1; $v[1]=0; $v[2]=0 } elseif($bump -eq 'minor'){ $v[1]=[int]$v[1]+1; $v[2]=0 } else{ $v[2]=[int]$v[2]+1 }; $new="$($v[0]).$($v[1]).$($v[2])"; Write-Output ">>> 新版本: $new"; (Get-Content $cargo -Raw) -replace 'version\s*=\s*"[^"]*"', "version = `"$new`"" | Set-Content $cargo -NoNewline; (Get-Content $tauri -Raw) -replace '"version"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"', "`"version`": `"$new`"" | Set-Content $tauri -NoNewline; Write-Output '>>> 版本已更新'; $exe='src-tauri\target\release\龙腾翻译.exe'; $zip='DragonTranslator.zip'; if (-not(Test-Path $zip) -or (Test-Path $exe) -and (Get-Item $exe).LastWriteTime -gt (Get-Item $zip).LastWriteTime) { Write-Output '>>> ZIP 过期, 重新打包...'; & '.\打包.bat' 'silent' }; Write-Output '>>> 打 Tag v$new...'; git add $cargo $tauri; git commit -m "chore: bump version to $new"; git tag -a "v$new" -m "v$new"; git push origin "v$new"; git push origin master; Write-Output ">>> Release v$new 已推送"
tasks.detail: 自动升版本号 → 检测 ZIP → 打包 → Tag → push

tasks.label: 📂 打开输出目录
tasks.detail: 打开 release 输出目录
